en: Zedekiah the son of Josiah, whom Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon made king in the land of Judah, reigned instead of Coniah the son of Jehoiakim.
zh: 約西亞的兒子西底家代替約雅敬的兒子哥尼雅作王；西底家是巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒所立在猶大地作王的。

en: But neither he nor his servants nor the people of the land listened to the words of the LORD that he spoke through Jeremiah the prophet.
zh: 西底家和他的臣僕，以及那地的人民，都不聽從耶和華藉耶利米先知所傳的話。

en: King Zedekiah sent Jehucal the son of Shelemiah, and Zephaniah the priest, the son of Maaseiah, to Jeremiah the prophet, saying, "Please pray for us to the LORD our God."
zh: 西底家王差派示利米雅的兒子猶甲和瑪西雅祭司的兒子西番雅，去見耶利米先知，說：“請你為我們向耶和華我們的 神禱告。”

en: Now Jeremiah was still going in and out among the people, for he had not yet been put in prison.
zh: 那時，耶利米還可以在民眾中間自由行動，因為他們還沒有把他關進監獄裡。

en: The army of Pharaoh had come out of Egypt. And when the Chaldeans who were besieging Jerusalem heard news about them, they withdrew from Jerusalem.
zh: 法老的軍隊已經從埃及出來；那些圍困耶路撒冷的迦勒底人聽見了他們的風聲，就從耶路撒冷撤退了。

en: Then the word of the LORD came to Jeremiah the prophet:
zh: 那時，耶和華的話臨到耶利米先知，

en: "Thus says the LORD, God of Israel: Thus shall you say to the king of Judah who sent you to me to inquire of me, 'Behold, Pharaoh's army that came to help you is about to return to Egypt, to its own land.
zh: “耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：你們要對差派你們來求問我的猶大王這樣說：‘看哪！那出來幫助你們的法老的軍隊，必回到他們的埃及本地去。

en: And the Chaldeans shall come back and fight against this city. They shall capture it and burn it with fire.
zh: 迦勒底人必回來，攻擊這城，佔領這城，放火燒毀這城。’

en: Thus says the LORD, Do not deceive yourselves, saying, "The Chaldeans will surely go away from us," for they will not go away.
zh: 耶和華這樣說：你們不要自己欺騙自己，說：‘迦勒底人必定離開我們！’因為他們必不離開。

en: For even if you should defeat the whole army of Chaldeans who are fighting against you, and there remained of them only wounded men, every man in his tent, they would rise up and burn this city with fire.'"
zh: 即使你們擊敗了那攻打你們的迦勒底全軍，他們中間只剩下一些受重傷的人，他們也必各從自己的帳棚裡起來，放火燒毀這城。’”

en: Now when the Chaldean army had withdrawn from Jerusalem at the approach of Pharaoh's army,
zh: 迦勒底人的軍隊因懼怕法老的軍隊而從耶路撒冷撤退的時候，

en: Jeremiah set out from Jerusalem to go to the land of Benjamin to receive his portion there among the people.
zh: 耶利米離開耶路撒冷，往便雅憫地去，要在那裡，在同鄉中間，取得自己的產業。

en: When he was at the Benjamin Gate, a sentry there named Irijah the son of Shelemiah, son of Hananiah, seized Jeremiah the prophet, saying, "You are deserting to the Chaldeans."
zh: 他到了便雅憫門，那裡有一個守衛的長官，名叫伊利雅，是哈拿尼雅的孫子、示利米雅的兒子；他拿住耶利米先知，說：“你想去投降迦勒底人！”

en: And Jeremiah said, "It is a lie; I am not deserting to the Chaldeans." But Irijah would not listen to him, and seized Jeremiah and brought him to the officials.
zh: 耶利米說：“這是謊話！我並不是去投降迦勒底人。”但伊利雅不聽他，仍拿住他，把他帶到眾領袖那裡。

en: And the officials were enraged at Jeremiah, and they beat him and imprisoned him in the house of Jonathan the secretary, for it had been made a prison.
zh: 眾領袖都惱怒耶利米，就打他，並且把他關進監裡，就是在書記約拿單的房子裡，因為他們已把這房子改作監獄。

en: When Jeremiah had come to the dungeon cells and remained there many days,
zh: 耶利米進了地牢裡的一個囚房，在那裡監禁了多日。

en: King Zedekiah sent for him and received him. The king questioned him secretly in his house and said, "Is there any word from the LORD?" Jeremiah said, "There is." Then he said, "You shall be delivered into the hand of the king of Babylon."
zh: 後來，西底家王派人去把他帶出來；王在自己的宮中私下問他，說：“從耶和華那裡有話來嗎？”耶利米回答：“有！”又說：“你必交在巴比倫王的手中。”

en: Jeremiah also said to King Zedekiah, "What wrong have I done to you or your servants or this people, that you have put me in prison?
zh: 耶利米再對西底家王說：“我有甚麼得罪你，或你的臣僕，或這人民，你竟然把我送進監獄裡呢？

en: Where are your prophets who prophesied to you, saying, 'The king of Babylon will not come against you and against this land'?
zh: 你們的先知曾向你們預言說：‘巴比倫王必不會來攻擊你們和這地。’他們現今在哪裡呢？

en: Now hear, please, O my lord the king: let my humble plea come before you and do not send me back to the house of Jonathan the secretary, lest I die there."
zh: 我主我王啊！現在求你垂聽，求你容我向你懇求！不要把我送回書記約拿單的房子去，免得我死在那裡。”

en: So King Zedekiah gave orders, and they committed Jeremiah to the court of the guard. And a loaf of bread was given him daily from the bakers' street, until all the bread of the city was gone. So Jeremiah remained in the court of the guard.
zh: 於是西底家王下令，把耶利米拘留在衛兵的院子裡；他們每天從餅鋪街拿一個餅給他，直到城裡的餅都吃光了。耶利米就這樣留在衛兵的院子裡。
